items.title: 'OEDIPUS' & MUPPETS GET TAX CREDIT EXTENSION
items.summary: EXCLUSIVE: New York State extended a prized theater tax credit for another six weeks, benefiting the incoming Broadway shows Rob Lake Magic with Special Guests The Muppets, Oedipus and the new musical Two Strangers (Carry a Cake Across New York).

items.title: 'CABARET' PRODUCERS: BACKER TRIED TO EXTORT US
items.summary: EXCLUSIVE: The lead producers of the recently-shuttered revival of Cabaret responded this week to a lawsuit by an Atlanta investor who alleged that he and other backers had been defrauded.

items.title: 'CHESS,' 'QUEEN OF VERSAILLES' GET TAX CREDIT REPRIEVE
items.summary: EXCLUSIVE: The Broadway League delivered welcome news to its members today: New York State found the funds to extend a valuable tax credit by five weeks, with another extension possible.

items.title: 'CABARET' INVESTOR SUES ATG AMID EARLY CLOSING
items.summary: EXCLUSIVE: An investor in the failed $24 million Broadway revival of Cabaret has sued its lead producers, accusing them of fraud.

items.title: IS BLACKSTONE BROADWAY'S NEXT BIG LANDLORD?
items.summary: EXCLUSIVE: The billion-dollar question on Broadway and the West End: Who will buy ATG Entertainment, an increasingly dominant force in live theater.

items.title: BROADWAY TAX CREDIT POOL IS DEPLETED
items.summary: EXCLUSIVE: A key subsidy for commercial plays and musicals is out of money.

items.title: PUBLIC THEATER REDUCED & REVISED EUSTIS' PAY
items.summary: EXCLUSIVE: In July 2023, when the Public Theater cut 19 percent of its staff, Artistic Director Oskar Eustis vowed to significantly reduce his own pay as a gesture of solidarity amid the austerity.

items.title: DANCIN' DESIGNERS DUE MORE THAN $200,000
items.summary: EXCLUSIVE: A Federal judge has ordered producer Joey Parnes and two of his companies to pay more than $200,000 owed to designers of his short-lived, 2023 revival of Bob Fosse's Dancin.'

items.title: Not enough people are talking about The Balusters!
items.summary: What a fantastic show! Tremendous depth in the cast, terrific pacing, and a couple audience-gasp twists = perfect broadway night. There’s never enough NEW stories brought to broadway and I think audiences really need to support when we get one, or there will be even fewer.
